recommendations.title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
recommendations.overview: The true story of the "Flying Sikh" world champion runner and Olympian Milkha Singh who overcame the massacre of his family, civil war during the India-Pakistan partition, and homelessness to become one of India's most iconic athletes.

recommendations.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
recommendations.overview: When Russia's first nuclear submarine malfunctions on its maiden voyage, the crew must race to save the ship and prevent a nuclear disaster.

recommendations.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
recommendations.overview: Raj is a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI. Simran is the daughter of Chaudhary Baldev Singh, who in spite of being an NRI is very strict about adherence to Indian values. Simran has left for India to be married to her childhood fi

recommendations.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
recommendations.overview: Growing up poor in Madras, India, Srinivasa Ramanujan Iyengar earns admittance to Cambridge University during WWI, where he becomes a pioneer in mathematical theories with the guidance of his professor, G.H. Hardy.

recommendations.title: Deadline
recommendations.overview: A screenwriter travels to an abandoned house to finish a script on time, but a series of strange events lead her to a psychological breakdown.

recommendations.title: Churchill
recommendations.overview: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 24 hours before D-Day.

recommendations.title: Hotel Mumbai
recommendations.overview: Mumbai, India, November 26, 2008. While several terrorists spread hatred and death through the city, others attack the Taj Mahal Palace Hotel. Both hotel staff and guests risk their lives, making unthinkable sacrifices to protect themselves and keep

recommendations.title: Luther
recommendations.overview: During the early 16th century, idealistic German monk Martin Luther, disgusted by the materialism in the church, begins the dialogue that will lead to the Protestant Reformation.

recommendations.title: The Marksman
recommendations.overview: When Chechen rebels take over a Russian nuclear reactor, it’s up to a special ops marksman to rescue the hostages and prevent nuclear catastrophe.

recommendations.title: Apollo 11
recommendations.overview: A look at the Apollo 11 mission to land on the moon led by commander Neil Armstrong and pilot Buzz Aldrin.
